segments.text: I would believe it. But either way, Dabuz fighting back pretty strongly now. He's taking this almost all the way back to even.
He's got that stage control, but no, Samsora's sneaking his way in.
Ooh, the close explosive flame, almost enough to do it, and he just taps him out with the turnip.
Samsora trying to swing the forward air.

full_text: I would believe it. But either way, Dabuz fighting back pretty strongly now. He's taking this almost all the way back to even. He's got that stage control, but no, Samsora's sneaking his way in. Ooh, the close explosive flame, almost enough to do it, and he just taps him out with the turnip. Samsora trying to swing the forward air.
